title: direct login button + zoomable cluster topology on kore homepage
description: ## Summary - Replaces the top-right "Kennenlernen →" CTA on `web.korczewski.de` with "Anmelden →" pointing at `/api/auth/login` so visitors can authenticate without the detour through the contact page. - Wraps the 12-node cluster topology figure in a new `KoreTopology.svelte` pan/zoom component (drag, mouse-wheel / pinch zoom, +/− / reset controls). The static `` was unreadable in full at narrower viewports. - Removes the now-unused `.w-topology*` styles from `KorePillars.astro`. ## Test plan - [ ] `task feature:website` rolls the website on mentolder + korczewski - [ ] Visit https://web.korczewski.de — verify "Anmelden →" top-right links to `/api/auth/login` and triggers Keycloak - [ ] Verify topology figure can be panned (drag), zoomed (mouse wheel) and reset (⟲) on desktop - [ ] Mobile: pinch-zoom and drag work on the topology figure - [ ] mentolder homepage (different brand) is unchanged 🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
